information_criteria_summary.headline: Reported holdout ablation comparisons for the penalized GLM lane; classical AIC/BIC and nested-model p-values were left explicit as not applicable.
information_criteria_summary.model_governance_note: Core-supported penalized GLM lane; not lasso credibility.

collinearity_summary.flagged_features: diff_starting_pitcher_quality | diff_bullpen_quality | diff_bullpen_availability | diff_lineup_talent | lineup_stability_diff | starter_quality_edge | bullpen_quality_edge | home_field_advantage
collinearity_summary.headline: Severe multicollinearity detected
collinearity_summary.recommended_actions: Remove one column from each exact duplicate feature set before interpreting GLM coefficients | Collapse or residualize severe pairwise feature clusters instead of keeping both raw signals | Do not treat coefficient magnitudes as stable until the flagged collinearity cluster is reparameterized

nonlinearity_summary.coverage_note: Targets smooth and hinge-shaped predictor nonlinearity. Random effects and dynamic state structure need separate GLMM/DGLM diagnostics.
nonlinearity_summary.headline: No meaningful nonlinear departures detected
nonlinearity_summary.recommended_actions: GLMM and DGLM choices are not identified by this static shape test alone; evaluate grouped and time-varying structure separately

market_truth_summary.note: Market truth compares validation probabilities against prediction-time and closing no-vig moneyline prices.

public_note.message: Compact public validation digest published from the local artifact set. Detailed coefficient paths, residual bins, and other high-volume tables stay private in GitHub Pages staging.
